message:
feat(ui): add search error display, fix suggestion visibility lifecycle, auto-collapse tool/system messages, and harden empty-state rendering

Search error display:
- Add search_error_message field to CassApp that captures the error
  string from SearchFailed events. When a search fails, the empty-state
  panel now shows "Search failed" with the error message in subtle text,
  instead of silently showing "No results" (which implied the query ran
  successfully but matched nothing). The error is cleared on the next
  successful search or new search request.
- New failed_empty_results_visible() predicate governs when the error
  state is rendered.

Suggestion visibility lifecycle:
- Suggestions (did-you-mean) are now only displayed when the query has
  settled (search completed, no pending edits, no in-flight refinement,
  and no error). Previously, suggestions could appear stale -- e.g., the
  user types a new character but the old suggestions remain visible until
  the new search completes, and pressing "1" would apply the stale
  suggestion instead of inserting the digit "1".
- visible_query_suggestion_count() centralizes the visibility check and
  caps at 3 suggestions. All rendering paths (single-pane empty state,
  multi-pane empty state) and the keyboard shortcut handler now use this
  single source of truth.
- visible_query_suggestion_row_for_shortcut() resolves numeric shortcuts
  by matching the shortcut field on visible suggestions, rather than
  using raw array indexing. This handles gaps (suggestions without
  shortcuts) correctly.
- Mouse click on suggestion now passes (idx + 1) to SuggestionApplied,
  fixing an off-by-one where clicking the second suggestion would apply
  the first.

Empty-state rendering improvements:
- Extract settled_zero_results_visible(), pending_query_search_visible(),
  active_empty_results_search_visible(), and failed_empty_results_visible()
  predicates to replace ad-hoc boolean combinations scattered across
  the rendering code.
- Show "Updating search..." spinner when the query is dirty but no search
  is in flight yet (pending state), and "Refining search..." when a
  progressive refinement is running.
- Suggestion hit-test rectangles are only populated when suggestions are
  actually visible, preventing phantom click targets.

Auto-collapse tool/system messages:
- When loading a conversation detail view, tool and system messages are
  now auto-collapsed by default. These messages are typically long
  (tool output, system prompts) and obscure the human/agent dialogue.
  Users can still expand them individually.

elide_text clarity:
- Minor refactor: compute total display width once and store in a
  named variable for readability.

Export error handling:
- export_session_markdown_task now propagates file read errors instead
  of silently stopping at the first invalid line (map_while(Result::ok)
  replaced with explicit match).

Comprehensive test coverage:
- 13 new tests covering suggestion visibility, shortcut dispatch,
  error state transitions, mouse click off-by-one fix, and search
  error clearing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
